combined_text: coenzyme coenzyme Also found in: Thesaurus, Medical, Financial, Encyclopedia, Wikipedia .co·en·zyme (kō-ĕn′zīm′)n. An organic substance that reversibly combines with a specific protein, the apoenzyme, andwith a substrate to form an active enzyme system.co′en·zy·mat′ic (-zə-măt′ĭk) adj.co·en′zy·mat′i·cal·ly a
